testsuite.name: Apertura de la pagina de casos

testcase.name: Abrir la URL, loguearse y navegar a agent

failure.message: Expected: an element that is visible but: no matching element found by [Guardar Proveedor located with: xpath: //button[contains(@class, 'editgrid-action-save') or @type='button' and contains(normalize-space(.), 'Guardar')]]
